findings.fix: Either reject --calendar-source production_calendar when no real source is wired, or at minimum add not_production_calendar warning + production_calendar_label_requires_real_source warning; add cron_readiness check that blocks production_calendar for cron caller

Add explicit parameter-source constraint: Gateway must derive --strategy-id / --strategy-version / --custom-ref / --universe-ref from cron schedule config, never from user message / notification payload / thread history
Implement severity_min filtering: build_failure_payload must drop payloads below route.severity_min (or demote severity_min to documented expectation and remove invalid_severity validator check)
Use independent tempfile.mkdtemp() not embedded in event_root; or document residual cleanup behavior with .cron-readiness-smoke-* prefix
Add optional event_paths: [str] field to operator_notification_payload.v1 sourced from run_result.written[].event_path
Update test count from 'Ran 20 tests' to 'Ran 25 tests' (matches M4d selfcheck and actual unittest discover output)
Add negative coverage for additional unknown flag patterns: --buy, --send-discord, --action sell; or grep sub.add_parser to prove no broker subcommand exists
Use draft.signal_date or args --signal-date for validation_event.v1.signal_date; only fallback to _today() with context_warnings signal
Replace hardcoded /tmp/... in example with ${STOCK_PICKING_OPERATOR_LOG} placeholder
Idempotent replay should return previous_event_path or last_written_paths so Gateway can log operator-visible retry audit
Add Decision Log entry: 'M4d reserves --calendar-source production_calendar as future marker; orchestrator does not yet block; M4e real source + cron_readiness check required'

tests_run.note: M4c selfcheck under-reports (claims 20); M4d selfcheck and actual unittest discover both 25

local_verification.operator_notification_route_validation: accepts valid local_log route; rejects dry_run_only=false and missing include_fields
local_verification.production_calendar_probe: DISCOVERY OK with --calendar-source production_calendar + --caller cron + no warning added (M001 evidence)

gate_decision.production_cron_deployment: BLOCKED until M001 fixed AND M4e real calendar source wired AND cron_readiness extended

ready_for_next_gate_conditions: M002 fixed (Gateway parameter source constraint in gateway-cron.md)
M003 fixed (severity_min filtering implemented or demoted to documented expectation)
prohibitions_even_after_above_conditions: Production cron must not be enabled until production_calendar is backed by a real market-calendar source
Until M002 lands, Gateway must not pass user-supplied strategy_id / custom_ref / universe_ref through to orchestrator (manual-only path is OK)
